creator: discipline@tiscali.it
text:
I'm on 13.2-STABLE amd64 and I'm using portmaster.
Sorry, I have not time to setup poudriere at the moment.
It seems that the problem is caused by the presence of devel/xxhash (as dependency for sysutils/jdupes); maybe there is some confusion with xxhash.h from devel/xxhash and the one bundled with the port.
